title: Security: OOB in evdi_gem_fault
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Same as https://labs.bluefrostsecurity.de/blog/cve-2023-2008.html  
  
[0] page_offset does not check whether it is larger than obj->size,and will cause OOB [1],which can cause any physical address to read and write.  
This vulnerability seems to be relatively easy to
